opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Running an agent at OS level creates interesting problems with process isolation—kernel-bypass techniques can reduce latency but introduce security concerns you'll need to address. You'll also find that context switching between agent and OS services adds more overhead than expected due to privilege level transitions.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building AI agents with multi-provider LLM routing, tool orchestration, and system-level integration patterns.
